policy: No paid external execution provider integration ships in v1.
clarification: Provider-neutral applies to external execution integrations. Generated static raster graphics should use the native Codex/ChatGPT image generator powered by GPT Image 2 by default when that built-in capability is available.
allowed: user-configured local adapters outside this repo
native Codex/ChatGPT image generation for generated static raster graphics
conditional: user-configured external execution outside this repo
native Codex/ChatGPT image generation when graphic generation is requested and available
full Hipson only when connected separately by the user
